benefits.description: Targeting knee injuries with BPC/TB injections in inverted triangle pattern above and below kneecap

side_effects.description: Stinging sensation at injection sites, less in tight muscles and when spread out

protocol_notes: Injects BPC/TB in knees (3 injections in inverted triangle: top two above knee, one under kneecap). Injects GHK-Cu separately. Uses multiple injection sites including traps, stomach, knees, upper glute, pecs, shoulders, hamstrings. Reports stinging less in tight muscles when injections spread out. Injects KPV in waist or glute separately. Treating torn meniscus, cracked cartilage, and knee swelling.
